endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Returns the Business calls settings resource for the given location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates the Business call settings for the specified location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/businesscallsinsights
endpoints.description: Returns insights for Business calls for a location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
